englishDefinitions: Similar to sauce; having the consistency or texture of sauce.
(figurative) Impertinent or disrespectful, often in a manner that is regarded as entertaining or amusing; smart.
persianTranslation: مشابه سس؛ دارای قوام یا بافت سس است.
(تصویری) گستاخ یا بی احترامی، اغلب به شیوه ای که سرگرم کننده یا سرگرم کننده تلقی می شود. هوشمند
examples: Bring the tomatoes to a boil and then simmer until they reach a saucy consistency.
She is a loud, saucy child who doesn't show a lot of respect to her elders.
I enjoyed the dancing, but my husband found it a little too saucy.
